body:
Closes #1364.

`InterpolatedOperation(operand; x, y, z)` returns a `KernelFunctionOperation` that interpolates a `Field` or `AbstractOperation` to fixed coordinates in the directions named by the keyword arguments. Specified directions are interpolated to the given coordinate and **reduced** (location → `Nothing`); unspecified directions keep the operand's location and are evaluated at its own nodes.

```julia
InterpolatedOperation(c; z=-100)   # 2D field at a fixed depth        → (Center, Center, Nothing)
InterpolatedOperation(c; x, y)     # a vertical column                → (Nothing, Nothing, Center)
InterpolatedOperation(u; z=-100)   # keeps u's horizontal (Face) loc  → (Face,   Center, Nothing)
```

The result drops straight into output writers / `Field(...)` / `compute!`, giving the grid-agnostic interpolated output requested in #1364.

Coordinates are the grid's **native** coordinates (`ξnode`/`ηnode`/`znode`), matching `interpolate!`, so it is correct on `LatitudeLongitudeGrid` / curvilinear grids where the horizontal coordinate is longitude/latitude rather than a Cartesian distance.

It follows the existing `ForcingOperation` / `BoundaryConditionOperation` idiom: a `const InterpolatedOperation = KernelFunctionOperation{…, <:InterpolatingKernelFunction}` type alias paired with a same-named constructor.

Tested on CPU/GPU in `test_abstract_operations.jl` (z-interpolation, x,y → column, x,y,z → point, staggered operand, `AbstractOperation` operand, and the no-coordinate `ArgumentError`).

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
title: Add InterpolatedOperation

body:
Since #5737, `materialize_immersed_boundary` for `GridFittedBottom` returns an `ib` wrapping a plain `OffsetArray` (`bottom_field.data`), not a `Field` — but the docstring still says "wrapped around a Field". The mismatch silently broke some downstream code that accessed `immersed_boundary.bottom_height` as a `Field`. This fixes the docstring and points to `bottom_height_field` as the way to obtain a `Field`.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
title: Fix stale `materialize_immersed_boundary` docstring
